title: galium longifolium
intro: Galium longifolium, also known as Long-leaved bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the bedstraw family (Galium spp.). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium longifolium include relief from menstrual cramps, skin irritations, and fever reduction, while also supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Galium longifolium is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for various medicinal purposes.
